notes: This batch processes only HEAT_DUMPS/20260225T070252Z/RUN_ENGINE_ENTROPY_0001 and treats it as historical sandbox residue, not as current runtime authority.
RUN_ENGINE_ENTROPY_0001 has 2558 files across exactly three child families: prompt_queue, lawyer_memos, and incoming_consumed.
The prompt queue preserves 134 exact seven-role rounds for 938 files total and includes a seventh PACK_SELECTOR lane that never appears in stored output families.
Prompt prefixes 000001 and 000002 have no downstream lawyer or consumed outputs, so the queue begins earlier than retained output storage.
Late prompts preserve orchestration lag: sequence 134 still reports requested_step 112 and next_inbox_sequence 131.
PACK_SELECTOR prompts are internally self-conflicted because they keep the A1_LAWYER_MEMO_v1 schema contract while instructing the model to emit one A1_STRATEGY_v1 object.
Lawyer memos and incoming consumed files are semantic shadow copies rather than independent evidence families.
The consumed family contains 66 early bare copies plus 744 memo-named copies, of which 684 carry __AUTOFILL.
All consumed JSON bodies matched lawyer memo JSON exactly after allowing for timestamp skew; no true semantic divergence was found.
Three prefixes, 000039, 000106, and 000111, retain two six-role lawyer waves and two consumed autofill waves under a single stable sequence id.
Prompt samples also embed large context tails including ROSETTA_INDEX and A1_BRAIN_TAIL blocks, which makes this branch a heavy inline-context sandbox surface.
possible_downstream_consequence_policy: possible downstream consequence only; no direct A2-1 or A1 promotion from this batch
source_family: archive heat dumps run_engine_entropy_0001 sandbox residue family
